title: darwinia oxylepis
side_effects: Darwinia oxylepis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe stomach cramps, nausea, and vomiting in individuals with pre-existing gastrointestinal conditions. Prolonged consumption of the plant can lead to liver damage and increased risk of bleeding due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In some cases, improper use of Darwinia oxylepis can cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, especially in individuals with sensitive skin. Overdosing on the plant can also lead to tremors, seizures, and even coma in extreme cases.
